header.subtitle: Local-first developer tools running in your browser

home.sidebarSubtitle: Collapse recommendations, favorites, and recent history to keep the workspace focused.
home.toolNavSubtitle: Browse by category instead of scanning one long button row.
home.recommendedSubtitle: Start with the share-ready additions and jump back into your common workflows faster.
home.recentSubtitle: Tools you opened most recently stay here so you can jump back in quickly.
home.recentEmpty: Open any tool from the tabs or recommended cards and it will appear here.
home.favoriteSubtitle: Pin the tools you use most so they stay one click away on the home surface.
home.favoriteEmpty: Favorite a tool to keep a quick launcher here on the home surface.

annotate.title: Screenshot Annotation
annotate.placeholder: Upload a screenshot to begin annotating
annotate.emptyHint: Upload a screenshot to begin annotating.
annotate.textPromptHint: Click the screenshot to place text, then apply it here.
annotate.invalidFormat: Unsupported image format. Please upload a PNG, JPG, or WEBP screenshot.
annotate.loadFailed: Unable to load that screenshot. Please try another image.
annotate.readFailed: Unable to read that screenshot. Please try again.
annotate.textPending: Text position saved. Enter the content below and apply it.
annotate.textEmptyError: Enter annotation text before applying it.
annotate.clearMissing: Upload a screenshot before clearing annotations.
annotate.exportFailed: PNG export failed in this browser.
annotate.imageScaled: Large screenshot loaded after scaling to {width} × {height}.
annotate.imageTooLargeReject: Screenshot too large ({width} × {height}). Compress it before annotating.

card.title: Text to Image Card
card.subtitle: Turn code, text, or notes into a shareable image card.
card.placeholder: Paste text, code, JSON, or notes here...
card.emptyPreview: Start typing to preview your shareable image card.
card.emptyInput: Enter content before exporting or copying.
card.exportFailed: Unable to generate the card image. Please try again.
card.copyUnavailable: Image copy is not supported in this browser. Export PNG instead.
card.copyFailed: Unable to copy the image. Export PNG instead.
card.clearSuccess: Card content cleared and defaults restored.

toolCards.timestamp: Convert timestamps, preview the current time, and pick date/time values quickly.
toolCards.image: Compress images locally with batch processing and custom crop support.
toolCards.convert: Run common file conversions and exports entirely in the browser.
toolCards.json: Format, minify, and validate JSON content.
toolCards.diff: Compare two blocks of text and review the differences side by side.
toolCards.base64: Quickly encode and decode Base64 content.
toolCards.count: Live text counts for characters, lines, and other writing stats.
toolCards.url: Encode or decode URLs and pasted strings for common developer workflows.
toolCards.regex: Test patterns, replacements, and match details in one place.
toolCards.jwt: Decode JWT headers, payloads, and expiry details locally.
toolCards.yaml: Convert between YAML and JSON formats.
toolCards.color: Translate HEX, RGB, and HSL values and generate related color schemes.
toolCards.annotate: Add arrows, notes, numbered callouts, and mosaic masking to screenshots, then export the result as PNG.
toolCards.card: Turn code, text, or notes into a shareable image card with PNG export and image copy.
toolCards.uuid: Generate UUID v4 in batch with uppercase and no-dash options.
toolCards.hash: Compute SHA-1/SHA-256/SHA-512 hash for text or files.
toolCards.password: Generate secure random passwords with configurable length and charset.
toolCards.caseconvert: Convert between camelCase, snake_case, kebab-case, and more.
toolCards.qrcode: Generate QR codes from text or URLs with PNG download.

diff.title: Text Diff
diff.emptyState: Enter text on both sides to compare

base64.title: Base64 Encode / Decode
base64.placeholder: Enter text to encode or decode...

image.title: Image Compress / Custom Crop
image.batchMetaIdle: Click, drag, or batch upload images
image.queueEmpty: No images yet. Upload images to switch between them and crop each one separately if needed.
image.emptyState: Drag images here or use the upload button above. By default, one crop rule applies to all uploaded images.
image.help: All images share the same crop by default. You can switch to a specific image and enable a custom crop for it only.
image.customCropToggle: Use custom crop for this image
image.exportSummaryIdle: Crop first, then export a compressed result and preview it below.
image.exportSummaryBatching: Processing {count} images and building a ZIP archive...
image.exportSummaryGenerating: Generating the preview for the current image...
image.resultEmpty: The preview will appear here after generation
image.batchMetaLoaded: {count} images loaded · Shared crop by default, with optional per-image overrides
image.generateFailedNoBlob: Generation failed: the browser could not create image data. Please try again.
image.generateSuccess: Preview generated. You can download it now or continue with batch export.
image.generateFailedGeneric: Generation failed while processing the current image.
image.downloadFailedNoResult: Download failed: generate a preview before downloading.
image.zipFailedNoEntries: ZIP export failed: there are no generated images to export.
image.zipFailedGeneric: ZIP export failed during batch processing.
image.dropHint: Drop images here, or click the button to select files
image.cropHint: Drag on the image to select crop area
image.previewHint: Click "Generate Preview" to see the compression result

convert.title: File Conversion
convert.defaultHint: All conversions run locally in your browser. Nothing is uploaded to a server.
convert.resultPlaceholder: The conversion result will appear here
convert.resultTextEmpty: Conversion completed, but the result is empty
convert.resultMetaImages: Result: {count} page images ready for ZIP download
convert.completedZipPreview: Generated {count} worksheet CSV files and packed them into a ZIP archive.
convert.completedZipMessage: Conversion complete: {count} worksheets exported as a CSV ZIP.
convert.completedSheetMessage: Conversion complete: worksheet {sheet} was exported to CSV.
convert.csvToXlsxPreview: CSV converted to XLSX. Click download to save the result.
convert.csvToXlsxMessage: Conversion complete: CSV was converted to XLSX.
convert.docxToTxtMessage: Conversion complete: DOCX content was extracted as TXT.
convert.pdfImagesMessage: Conversion complete: generated previews for {count} pages.
convert.preparingImageZip: Preparing a ZIP download for {count} images...
convert.downloadedImageZip: Download complete: PDF page image ZIP exported.
convert.downloadFailedNoResult: Download failed: there is no conversion result to download.
convert.invalidPageRange: Page range is out of bounds: {range}

typeHints.xlsx-to-csv: Upload an Excel file and convert it to CSV text.
typeHints.csv-to-xlsx: Upload a CSV file and convert it to an XLSX workbook.
typeHints.docx-to-txt: Upload a Word document and extract plain text as TXT.
typeHints.pdf-to-text: Upload a PDF file and extract its text content.
typeHints.pdf-to-images: Upload a PDF file and render each page as an image.

convert.dropzone: You can also drag and drop a file here

convert.dropHint: Drop file here, or click the button to select
